title: ResearchWorkflowContract
description: Input/output contract for the research workflow stage. The stage receives a ContentBrief and a set of source documents, and produces a document-grounded ResearchPack.

input.description: Input to the research stage: a normalized ContentBrief and the source documents to research from.

sources.description: Source documents provided for research. May be empty, in which case the output ResearchPack status will likely be insufficient. The research stage must not use general knowledge without a source entry here.

source_id.description: Unique identifier for this source document. Matches source_id in ResearchPack findings.

title.description: Title or filename of the source. Null if not available.

content.description: Full text content of the source document (or the relevant extracted portion). Must be non-empty.

page_start.description: First page number of the content excerpt within the source. Null for sources without page structure (web, plain text).

page_end.description: Last page number of the content excerpt within the source. Null for sources without page structure. Must be >= page_start when both are set.
